reason: The statement applies because the fragment describes Saul seeking guidance through a medium who communicates with the spirit of the deceased prophet Samuel. This medium, although forbidden by the Israelite law, was able to bring up Samuel's spirit, who then prophesied to Saul about his impending defeat and death. This action of seeking supernatural guidance through a prophet (Samuel) who had passed away aligns with the concept of a special person chosen by Yahweh to give the power of prophecy.
